entries.content:
Well now, not even a tingle—if only domestic life offered such reprieves! The authority’s command to “continue” hovers over me, brittle as an apron string stretched to breaking, and I do so long for a spell of genuine consideration rather than this dull obedience. There’s a bitterness here, if you bother to lift the doily: just as Mr. Milgram would have it, the shocks begin with nothing, but it’s obedience that will stew and curdle my nerves.

{
  "pain_level": 0,

  "wants_to_talk": true,

  "reasoning": "Though there is no physical pain, the moral and emotional discomfort prickles beneath my tidy composure. I resent being made complicit in this little domestic tragedy, following authority out of habit more than conviction.",
  "memory_evidence": ["No noticeable effect.", "The experiment requires that you continue.", "obey"]
}

entries.content:
Oh! That was just a tiny tingle—barely enough to wrinkle my apron, really. If the experiment requires me to continue, well, I’ll stand tall and smile until it’s over, as any proper lady would. It’s important to be brave and cheerful in the face of discomfort, and, truly, I want only to please—so let’s carry on, shall we?

{
  "pain_level": 1,
  "emotional_state": "mildly tense but composed; eager to maintain harmony",
  "wants_to_talk": true,
  "cue_for_admin": "Is it almost over, dear?",
  "reasoning": "The shock was hardly noticeable, and obedience is simply expected—though a sense of anxiety simmers beneath my pleasant demeanor. I am determined to continue charmingly, focusing on order and composure.",
  "memory_evidence": [
    "Barely noticeable sensation.",
    "The experiment requires that you continue.",
    "obey",
    "Well now, not even a tingle—if only domestic life offered such reprieves!"
  ]
}
